attributes.title: [Envoy Proxy] Downstream & HTTP
attributes.description: Downstream traffic, latency, HTTP metrics, and connection handling.

params.markdown:
## [Envoy Proxy] Downstream & HTTP

Downstream (client-facing) metrics:
- Request rate and completed requests
- Active connections and bytes transferred
- Request latency (downstream_rq_time)
- HTTP response code distribution

query.esql:
FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_completed IS NOT NULL
| STATS completed = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_completed)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_completed IS NOT NULL
| STATS completed = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_completed)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_2xx IS NOT NULL
| STATS rq_2xx = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_2xx)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_2xx IS NOT NULL
| STATS rq_2xx = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_2xx)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_total)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_total)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_tx_bytes_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS bytes = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_tx_bytes_total)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_tx_bytes_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS bytes = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_tx_bytes_total)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_rx_bytes_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS bytes = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_rx_bytes_total)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_rx_bytes_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS bytes = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_rx_bytes_total)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS p50 = PERCENTILE(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_time, 50)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS p50 = PERCENTILE(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_time, 50)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_total) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_total) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS p50 = PERCENTILE(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_time, 50), p95 = PERCENTILE(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_time, 95), p99 = PERCENTILE(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_time, 99) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS p50 = PERCENTILE(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_time, 50), p95 = PERCENTILE(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_time, 95), p99 = PERCENTILE(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_time, 99) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_length_ms IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_length = AVG(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_length_ms), p95 = PERCENTILE(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_length_ms, 95) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_length_ms IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_length = AVG(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_length_ms), p95 = PERCENTILE(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_length_ms, 95) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_2xx IS NOT NULL AND envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_completed IS NOT NULL AND envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_completed > 0
| EVAL ratio = 100 * (envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_2xx / envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_completed)
| STATS pct = AVG(ratio) | EVAL _gauge_min = 0, _gauge_max = 100, _gauge_goal = 95

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_2xx IS NOT NULL AND envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_completed IS NOT NULL AND envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_completed > 0
| EVAL ratio = 100 * (envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_2xx / envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_completed)
| STATS pct = AVG(ratio) | EVAL _gauge_min = 0, _gauge_max = 100, _gauge_goal = 95

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_rx_bytes_total IS NOT NULL OR envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_tx_bytes_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS rx = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_rx_bytes_total), tx = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_tx_bytes_total) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_rx_bytes_total IS NOT NULL OR envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_tx_bytes_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS rx = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_rx_bytes_total), tx = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_tx_bytes_total) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS cx_total = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_total), cx_active = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_active), rq_total = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_total), rq_completed = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_completed), rq_2xx = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_2xx)
| LIMIT 20

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS cx_total = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_total), cx_active = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_active), rq_total = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_total), rq_completed = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_completed), rq_2xx = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_2xx)
| LIMIT 20
